personal_info.name: Jenil Jagdishbhai Goti
personal_info.highlight: AI Engineer | Machine Learning & Generative AI | LLMs, Agents, Evaluation | Building production-ready AI products | M.Sc. @ Hochschule Aalen

summary: AI & ML Engineer with a strong focus on Agentic AI and LLM Engineering — designing and building intelligent multi-agent systems that can reason, plan, and act autonomously. Specialized in developing end-to-end agentic pipelines using LangGraph and LangChain, combining RAG, tool use, and feedback loops. Strong foundation in deep learning, computer vision, and NLP.

responsibilities: Design and develop end-to-end AI and ML solutions for client projects
Experiment with different models to select optimal solutions
Deploy and train pretrained ML models on AWS EC2
Build REST APIs using FastAPI to serve ML models

experience.role: Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Engineer Intern
responsibilities: Develop and train ML models for classification and prediction
Perform data preprocessing and feature engineering
Promoted to full-time role within 3 months
Develop responsive web applications using React and Next.js
Collaborate on API development using AWS API Gateway

projects.name: German Administrative Process Navigator
projects.description: AI agent to help users navigate German administrative systems using Neo4j graph modeling. Detects circular dependencies and provides optimized paths.

projects.name: AI Research Agent
projects.description: Multi-agent research assistant that autonomously searches, scrapes, and generates structured reports with self-feedback loop.
features: Planner, Tool Executor, Writer, Critic agents

projects.name: Football Player Tracker
projects.description: Real-time football tracking system using YOLOv8 and ByteTrack

projects.name: Human Action Detection
projects.description: Image classification model recognizing 15 human actions using ResNet18

projects.name: Toxic Comment Classification
projects.description: Multi-label NLP classifier using BERT for detecting toxic comments

projects.name: Heart Disease Prediction
projects.description: ML model predicting heart disease probability using patient data

projects.name: Lane Line Detection
projects.description: Lane detection system using OpenCV and image processing

projects.name: MES VisionX
projects.description: Manufacturing execution system using AWS and Next.js

projects.name: Advanced Reliable Real Estate Portal
projects.description: Online real estate platform using Node.js and Express

publications.title: Hybrid Approaches for Image Registration
publications.description: Research comparing hybrid methods for medical and satellite image alignment, showing up to 399% improvement.
